package rulefixtures

import (
	"fmt"
	"net/http"
)

// scenario for panic_stack_trace_to_client: `recover()` in HTTP middleware that sends the panic message/stack to the response writer
// fixture polarity: positive; family: security; severity: warning.
func scenario727Positive(w http.ResponseWriter) {
	defer func() { if recovered := recover(); recovered != nil { fmt.Fprintf(w, "panic: %v", recovered) } }()
	panic("boom")
}
